confidence_notes: All skills extracted from demonstrated project work and research experience. Object Detection and Facial Expression projects provide concrete evidence of PyTorch, OpenCV, CUDA, FastAPI, React, and AWS usage. Research role confirms Python and data preprocessing skills. Self-reported skills section corroborated by project implementations.

projects.name: Object Detection System for Traffic Analysis
projects.summary: Trained YOLOv8 model on 12,000 annotated traffic images achieving 91% mAP (12% improvement over YOLOv5 baseline). Implemented real-time inference pipeline with 28 FPS on NVIDIA T4 using OpenCV and CUDA. Deployed FastAPI endpoint on AWS EC2 with live demo at traffic-demo.priya.dev.

projects.name: Facial Expression Classifier
projects.summary: Fine-tuned ResNet-50 CNN in PyTorch to classify 7 emotional states from webcam frames, achieving 88% accuracy on FER2013 test set. Integrated into React web app for real-time emotion detection demo.

impact_highlights.description: Object Detection System achieved 91% mAP on custom traffic dataset, representing a 12% improvement over YOLOv5 baseline model.
Real-time inference pipeline optimized with CUDA achieved 28 FPS on NVIDIA T4 GPU, enabling practical deployment for traffic analysis.
Facial Expression Classifier achieved strong accuracy on industry-standard FER2013 benchmark dataset.
Object Detection System deployed to production on AWS EC2 with live public endpoint.
Preprocessed and augmented large-scale medical imaging dataset for research publication.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, CUDA, FastAPI, React, AWS extracted from two completed projects with concrete implementations and metrics. All skills directly corroborated by project descriptions.
Git, Docker extracted from tools section and corroborated by research assistant role involving dataset preprocessing and AWS deployment workflow.

TensorFlow, NumPy, Pandas extracted from libraries section. NumPy and Pandas strongly implied by data preprocessing work in research role; TensorFlow listed but PyTorch is primary framework used in projects.
C++ and Java listed in skills section but NO project or work experience evidence provided. Excluded per strict extraction rules requiring corroboration.
